swahili.solve_5_basic_grid_challenges: Tatua changamoto 5 za msingi za gridi
swahili.skip_count_overlay_multiplication_as_r: 🔢 Tabaka la kuhesabu kwa kuruka (kuzidisha = kujumlisha mara kwa mara)
swahili.split_at_column_position: Gawanya kwenye nafasi ya safu wima
swahili.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Sifa ya usambazaji: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
swahili.areamodel_data_table: jedwali la data la modeli ya eneo
swahili.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Gawanya nambari za tarakimu nyingi kuwa makumi na vimoja, zidisha kila jozi, kisha jumlisha!
swahili.b_per_row_per_group: B (kwa kila safu mlalo / kwa kila kundi)
swahili.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Gridi ndiyo picha. Kuzidisha ndiyo hisabati.
swahili.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Chagua hadithi. Angalia gridi inayolingana. Kuzidisha ni kuhesabu vitu ndani ya mstatili. Kutatua 5 kunatoa beji ya 📝 Mchawi wa Maneno.
swahili.ai_area_model_tutor: 🤖 Mwalimu wa AI wa Modeli ya Eneo
swahili.close_ai_tutor_panel: Funga kidirisha cha mwalimu wa AI
swahili.ask_the_area_model_tutor: Uliza mwalimu wa modeli ya eneo
swahili.reset_all_dimensions_and_challenges: Weka upya vipimo vyote na changamoto
swahili.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Gridi ya Msingi — kuzidisha kama eneo
swahili.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b ni eneo la mstatili wa a kwa b. Huu ndio daraja kutoka kuhesabu kwa kuruka hadi kuzidisha. Common Core 3.MD.7: unganisha eneo na kuzidisha na kujumlisha.
swahili.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Kata gridi ya 4×7 kuwa 4×5 + 4×2; jumla ile ile. Sifa ya usambazaji ni uti wa mgongo wa aljebra wa kila upanuzi unaofuata. Common Core 3.OA.5.
swahili.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Gawanya vigawe kwa thamani ya nafasi: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Daraja kuelekea njia ya kimiani, kisha algoriti ya kawaida. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
swahili.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Bustani yenye safu 4 za mimea 6. Ukumbi wa michezo wenye safu 8 za viti 12. Kila ukweli wa kuzidisha unaishi ndani ya mstatili wa ulimwengu halisi. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
swahili.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: badilisha hali | N: changamoto mpya | C: ubadilishanaji | ?: mwalimu wa AI
swahili.distributive_property_a_b_c_ab_ac: 🔢 Sifa ya usambazaji — a(b+c) = ab + ac
swahili.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Vitelezi vya safu mlalo × safu wima. Uainishaji tofauti wa hali 4. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Dhana: eneo = safu mlalo + safu wima ni lini?
swahili.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Tafuta ukubwa ambapo eneo = mzunguko (nambari kamili adimu).
swahili.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Kubadilisha safu mlalo/safu wima kunabadilisha kitu lini?
swahili.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Naelewa — eleza kwa maneno yangu mwenyewe
swahili.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Eleza sifa ya ubadilishanaji + eneo = urefu × upana.
swahili.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Dokezo la kubuni: uainishaji tofauti wa hali 4; hakuna alama ya jaribio la eneo; hakuna ufunuo — kwa makusudi.

somali.solve_5_basic_grid_challenges: Xalli 5 caqabadood oo aasaasi ah oo shabaqo
somali.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Sifada qaybinta: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
somali.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 U kala jajab tirooyinka tiro-badan tobanaan iyo mid, isku dhufo lammaan kasta, ka dibna isku dar!
somali.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Shabaqadu waa sawirka. Isku-dhufashadu waa xisaabta.
somali.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Dooro sheeko. Eeg shabaqada u dhiganta. Isku-dhufashadu waa tirinta waxyaabaha gudaha leydi. Xallinta 5 waxay ku siisaa calaamadda 📝 Saaxir Erayga.
somali.reset_all_dimensions_and_challenges: Dib u deji dhammaan cabbiraadaha iyo caqabadaha
somali.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Shabaqo Aasaasi — isku-dhufashada oo ah bed
somali.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b waa bedka leydi a ku-dhufan b. Kani waa buundada laga gudbo tirinta-boodboodka una gudbo isku-dhufashada. Common Core 3.MD.7: ku xidh bedka isku-dhufashada iyo isku-darka.
somali.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Qaybin — kala qaybi leydiga, hayso bedka
somali.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Goo shabaqo 4×7 oo u kala dhig 4×5 + 4×2; isku wadar. Sifada qaybintu waa lafdhabarka aljebra ee balaadhin kasta oo soo socota. Common Core 3.OA.5.
somali.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: U kala jajab factorrada qiimaha goobta: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Buundo loo aado habka qaybaha, ka dibna algorithm caadi ah. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
somali.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Beer leh 4 saf oo 6 geed ah. Tiyaatar leh 8 saf oo 12 kursi ah. Xaqiiqo kasta oo isku-dhufasho waxay ku nooshahay gudaha leydi adduunka dhabta ah. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
somali.same_product_a_b_b_a: 💡 Wax-soo-saar isku mid ah! a×b = b×a
somali.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: bedel habka | N: caqabad cusub | C: is-bedel | ?: macallinka AI
somali.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Sliderro safaf × tiirar. Kala-saar gooni ah oo 4-xaaladood. Dhibcood ma jiraan, daahfur ma jiro.
somali.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Mala-awaal: goorma ayaa bedku = safaf + tiirar?
somali.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Hel cabbirro halka bedku = wareeg (tirooyin dhan oo naadir ah).
somali.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Goorma ayuu beddelka safafka/tiirarka wax beddelaa?
somali.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Sharax sifada is-bedelka + bed = dherer × balac.
somali.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Qoraal naqshadeed: kala-saar gooni ah oo 4-xaaladood; dhibco imtixaan bed ma jiraan; daahfur ma jiro — si ula kac ah.

hausa.solve_5_basic_grid_challenges: Warware ƙalubale 5 na grid na asali
hausa.solve_5_multi_digit_challenges: Warware ƙalubale 5 na lambobi masu yawa
hausa.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Halayyar rabawa: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
hausa.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Raba lambobi masu lamba da yawa zuwa goma da ɗaya, ninka kowane biyu, sannan ka ƙara!
hausa.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Grid shine hoton. Ninkawa shine lissafi.
hausa.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Zaɓi labari. Duba grid mai daidaitawa. Ninkawa shine ƙidaya abubuwa cikin murabba'i mai kusurwa huɗu. Warware 5 yana ba da lambar yabo ta 📝 Mai Sihirin Matsalar Kalma.
hausa.reset_all_dimensions_and_challenges: Sake saita dukkan girma da ƙalubale
hausa.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Grid na Asali — ninkawa a matsayin yanki
hausa.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b shine yankin murabba'i mai kusurwa huɗu na a da b. Wannan shine gada daga ƙidaya-tsalle zuwa ninkawa. Common Core 3.MD.7: haɗa yanki da ninkawa da ƙari.
hausa.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Rabawa — raba murabba'i mai kusurwa huɗu, kiyaye yanki
hausa.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Yanka grid na 4×7 zuwa 4×5 + 4×2; jimla iri ɗaya. Halayyar rabawa ita ce ginshiƙin algebra na kowane faɗaɗa na gaba. Common Core 3.OA.5.
hausa.partial_products_23_47_made_visible: Sakamako na Sashe — an sa 23 × 47 a bayyane
hausa.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Raba factors ta ƙimar wuri: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Gada zuwa hanyar lattice, sannan ma'aunin algorithm. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
hausa.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Lambu mai layuka 4 na shuke-shuke 6. Gidan wasan kwaikwayo mai layuka 8 na kujeru 12. Kowace gaskiyar ninkawa tana rayuwa cikin murabba'i mai kusurwa huɗu na duniyar gaske. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
hausa.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: canza hanya | N: sabon ƙalubale | C: musanya | ?: malamin AI
hausa.standard_rectangle: 🟩 Murabba'i mai kusurwa huɗu na ma'auni
hausa.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Sliders na layuka × shafuka. Rarrabuwa daban ta yanayi 4. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ka makale — nuna tambayoyi a buɗe
hausa.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Nemo girma inda yanki = kewaye (lambobi cikakku da ba kasafai ba).
hausa.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Yaushe musanya layuka/shafuka ke canza wani abu?
hausa.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Bayyana halayyar musanya + yanki = tsayi × faɗi.
hausa.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Bayanin ƙira: rarrabuwa daban ta yanayi 4; babu makin gwajin yanki; babu bayyanawa — da gangan.

yoruba.ask_the_ai_tutor_a_question: Bi olùkọ́ AI ní ìbéèrè kan
yoruba.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Ànímọ́ ìpín: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
yoruba.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Pín àwọn nọ́mbà oníka-púpọ̀ sí ẹ̀wádún àti ẹyọ, sọ ìbéjì kọ̀ọ̀kan di púpọ̀, lẹ́yìn náà fikún!
yoruba.b_per_row_per_group: B (fún ìlà kọ̀ọ̀kan / fún àwùjọ kọ̀ọ̀kan)
yoruba.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Gírídì ni àwòrán náà. Ìsọdipúpọ̀ ni ìṣirò náà.
yoruba.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Yan ìtàn kan. Wo gírídì tó bára mu. Ìsọdipúpọ̀ ni kíka àwọn nǹkan nínú onígun mẹ́rin. Yíyanjú 5 ń fún ọ ní àmì 📝 Oṣó Ìṣòro Ọ̀rọ̀.
yoruba.reset_all_dimensions_and_challenges: Tún gbogbo ìwọ̀n àti ìpèníjà ṣe
yoruba.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Gírídì Ìpìlẹ̀ — ìsọdipúpọ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí àgbègbè
yoruba.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b ni àgbègbè onígun mẹ́rin a ní b. Èyí ni afárá láti ìkàwé-fò sí ìsọdipúpọ̀. Common Core 3.MD.7: so àgbègbè pọ̀ mọ́ ìsọdipúpọ̀ àti ìfikún.
yoruba.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Ìpín — pín onígun mẹ́rin, pa àgbègbè mọ́
yoruba.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Gé gírídì 4×7 sí 4×5 + 4×2; àpapọ̀ kan náà. Ànímọ́ ìpín ni egungun ẹ̀yìn algebra ti gbogbo ìmúgbòòrò tó tẹ̀lé. Common Core 3.OA.5.
yoruba.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Pín àwọn òkùnfà nípa iye ipò: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Afárá sí ọ̀nà lattice, lẹ́yìn náà algorithm tó péye. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
yoruba.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Ọgbà kan tó ní ìlà 4 ti ohun ọ̀gbìn 6. Ilé eré kan tó ní ìlà 8 ti ìjókòó 12. Gbogbo òtítọ́ ìsọdipúpọ̀ ń gbé inú onígun mẹ́rin ti ayé gidi. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
yoruba.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: yí ipo padà | N: ìpèníjà tuntun | C: ìpààrọ̀ | ?: olùkọ́ AI
yoruba.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Àwọn sláìdà fún ìlà × ọwọ̀n. Ìpín ọ̀tọ̀ ti ipò 4. Kò sí àmì, kò sí ìṣípayá.
yoruba.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Àbá: ìgbà wo ni àgbègbè = ìlà + ọwọ̀n?
yoruba.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 O dí — fi àwọn ìbéèrè ṣíṣí hàn
yoruba.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Wá àwọn ìwọ̀n níbi tí àgbègbè = ìyíká (àwọn nọ́mbà odindi tó ṣọ̀wọ́n).
yoruba.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Ìgbà wo ni ìpààrọ̀ ìlà/ọwọ̀n ń yí ohunkóhun padà?
yoruba.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Mo ní òye — ṣàlàyé pẹ̀lú ọ̀rọ̀ tèmi
yoruba.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Ṣàlàyé ànímọ́ ìpààrọ̀ + àgbègbè = gígùn × ìbú.
yoruba.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Àkíyèsí àpẹrẹ: ìpín ọ̀tọ̀ ti ipò 4; kò sí àmì àdánwò àgbègbè; kò sí ìṣípayá — mọ̀ọ́mọ̀.
